claim: PKG-la plays an essential role in expression of spinal long term potentiation in PGK-la knockout mice.
evidence_sentences: Patch clamp recordings showed that activity-induced LTP at identified synapses between nociceptors and spinal neurons projecting to the periaqueductal grey (PAG) was completely abolished in SNS-PKG-I(-/-) mice, although basal synaptic transmission was not affected.
